title: Fragrant Tunisian Prawn Tagine
description: A light and flavorful Tunisian dish featuring prawns, with a nutty and molten sauce, diabetic-friendly and cooked to perfection in a Dutch oven.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the ground cumin and smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the thawed prawns and cook for 2-3 minutes, until they start to turn pink.
Add the chicken broth, diced tomatoes, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 10 minutes.
Stir in the chopped fresh parsley and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Remove the prawns from the sauce with a slotted spoon and plunge them into an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
Return the prawns to the sauce and serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Cook poultry to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F before serving.
